title: perityle emoryi
intro: Perityle emoryi, also known as Emory's globemallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Perityle emoryi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, salves, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
